name: 28X Telephoto Zoom Lens
description: Powerful 28X optical zoom telescope lens for your smartphone. Comes with a tripod for stable shots, a phone clip, and a protective case. Ideal for concerts, bird watching, and long-range photography.

name: 12X Telephoto Lens (Metal Body)
description: Premium 12X telephoto lens with a durable aerospace-grade metal body. Delivers sharp, clear magnification for distant subjects. Includes a mini tripod and a universal mount for all smartphones.

name: 36X Telephoto Zoom Lens
description: Our most powerful optical zoom. The 36X Telephoto lens brings extremely distant subjects into sharp focus. Perfect for wildlife, concerts, and architectural detail. Comes with a professional-grade stabilizing tripod.

name: 8X Telephoto Zoom Lens
description: Compact and powerful. The 8X Telephoto lens is the perfect entry-level optic for mobile photographers. Capture clear, magnified shots of subjects from a distance. Includes a universal clip mount.

name: 18X Telephoto Lens (Metal Body)
description: Professional 18X magnification in a rugged metal chassis. This lens set includes a super wide-angle and macro lens attachment for ultimate versatility. Engineered for stability and clarity in all lighting conditions.

name: Apexel 20-40X Telephoto Zoom Lens
description: The ultimate adjustable zoom lens. This Apexel flagship features a dual-ring system for independent focus and zoom control (20X-40X). Includes a professional-grade stabilizing tripod and weather-resistant carrying case. Multi-coated glass ensures zero chromatic aberration.

name: 37mm Adjustable Variable ND Filter (ND2-400)
description: Master long exposures and cinematic lighting. This variable ND filter provides adjustable light reduction from 1 to 9 stops (ND2-ND400). High-quality optical glass ensures no color cast. Includes a universal 37mm clip-on mount for all smartphones.
